message:
fix(abi): eliminate all libc::syscall calls from glibc_internal_abi.rs

Add syscall wrappers for ioperm, syslog and migrate 42 libc::syscall
calls in glibc_internal_abi.rs to use native raw syscalls:

- adjtimex (adjtime helper functions)
- arch_prctl (x86_64 only)
- getpgid, setpgid
- gettimeofday (x86_64, falls back to clock_gettime on aarch64)
- statfs, mknodat
- futimesat (x86_64 only)
- getcwd, getegid, getgroups
- init_module, delete_module
- iopl, ioperm (x86_64 only)
- modify_ldt (x86_64 only)
- setfsgid, setfsuid
- times, uselib (x86_64), vhangup
- sendmmsg
- mq_open
- prlimit64 (getrlimit)
- getrandom, clock_gettime
- newfstatat, fchmodat
- futex (low-level locks)
- msgrcv, msgsnd
- syslog (klogctl)
- pidfd_getpid

Add proper arch-specific stubs returning ENOSYS for syscalls not
available on aarch64.

Progress: 42 -> 0 libc::syscall calls in glibc_internal_abi.rs
Combined with previous commit: 61 -> 0 total libc::syscall calls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
